title: PokeSpace Colony
description: A modpack created by me to enjoy the mods I loved the most.
body:
![Most of the mods of the modpack in one image.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5899fa747b952330e7b1aed81ba52cc974f33d3c.png)
# GOAL
As a big fan of modded Minecraft. I've always wanted to play with a custom modpack and my favorite mods only. Finally, after a lot of time playing around with the mods versions, I finally managed to find my favorite mods that were compatible with each other, making for an incredible adventure in both single-player and multiplayer as you witch.

# FEATURING
- Ad Astra - A space exploration mod on his own who let you explore the Minecraft solar system and even reach outter space.
- Cobblemon - A Minecraft version of Pokemon wich add a lots of mons that have a model as faithfull as possible to Minecraft.
- Valkyrian Skies and Eureka - A mod that allow you to change any structure into a rideable entity allowing you to vogue the seas or explore the skies with a ship or a space ship or just a piece of wood, it's up to you. It is compatible with the Physic mod !
- Create - Allowing you to turn wind, water or steam energy into rotational energy that make possible the impossible.
  _* Create addition (included) is the only mod able to create RF energy in the modpack necessary to power Ad Astra and Refined Storage machines *_
- Distant Horizon - Make you able to see all charged chunk as long as it was loaded once, you'll see from anywhere with a low-resolution render but at 256 chunk of distance, you don't even see the difference !
- Embeddium, Embeddium ++ and Oculus that make you enjoy this beautiful pack with more FPS and SHADERS ! (BSL Shaders pre-installed compatible with Distant Horizon, Physic mod and Eureka).
- Ice and Fire add mythologicals creatures to your world: Dragon, Troll, Cyclops, etc. You might even get the chance to tame one of these !
- Minecolonies that give you the chance to create your own Empire or just be the leader of your little village, (Watchout: Very time-consumming mod and addictive).
- Ars Nouveau - Allow you to become the wizard you always wanted to be ! Finally, no more waiting for that Hogwarts letter. And with Ars Elemental, you could event become affiliated to one of the elemental school !
- AND MANY MORE (See changelog for full list)

MOD NON-INCLUDED DUE TO COPYRIGHT REASON (Compatible with the modpack) 
**LINK**:([https://www.patreon.com/Haubna](https://www.patreon.com/Haubna))
- Physic mod PRO that allow realistic water movement (waves, bumpy boat rides, up and down), snow, smoke, block destruction, etc.
